name: Amerigo Resources Ltd.
description: Amerigo Resources Ltd. is an innovative copper producer that produces copper concentrate and molybdenum concentrate by processing fresh and historic tailings from Codelco's El Teniente mine, the world's largest underground copper mine, located in Chile. The processing is performed by Amerigo's 100% owned Minera Valle Central (MVC) operation. Amerigo provides investors with safe, low-risk exposure to copper, with a low-capital-cost operation and a strong commitment to returning capital to shareholders.
